productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Unisex ST Bpack GR Black Backpacks
description: The heritage line of adidas, the adidas originals, brings to you this tribal print inspired bag. The funky print and an extra organiser pouch makes this a must have in your casual wardrobe.Made of 100% polyester for durability and easy maintenanceMain zippered compartment with a padded slot to hold a small laptop and a sleeve that creates space to hold accessoriesOne zippered compartment on the front Detachable organiser pouchBranding in print on the frontPadded back for laptop safety and carrying easeAdjustable padded shoulder straps for carrying easeCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
